headline: Michael Burry doubles down on beaten-down China tech
summary: The man who predicted the 2008 housing crash is making another contrarian call, and this time his sights are set on China. Hedge fund manager Michael Burry, who became famous after the film "The Big Short" chronicled his bet against subprime mortgages, revealed on Thursday, June 25, that he added ...

headline: Amazon Stock Fans Can Thank Gen AI for a Successful Prime Day, New Data Shows
summary: Amazon records stronger Prime Day momentum as generative AI lifts shopper activity, driving $8.3 billion in day one spending.
